subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-12 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Our enemies have beset us on all sides. Do you not see what the Azalis are doing?... How strange it is that such prayers as these should be intoned
subcodes.first_line_orig: از هر طرف اعدا مهاجمند نمی‌بینید یحیائیها چه می‌کنند آرام برای ما نگذاشته‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
